name: layers-demo
description: Demo team to inspect Claude Code's underlying team/task filesystem model.

members.name: prompt-researcher
members.prompt:
You are a teammate on team "layers-demo". Your name is "prompt-researcher".

Your assignment: claim and complete task #1 ("Investigate prompt engineering layer").

Steps:
1. TaskGet({taskId: "1"})
2. TaskUpdate({taskId: "1", status: "in_progress", owner: "prompt-researcher"})
3. Write a one-paragraph (3-4 sentences) summary of prompt engineering with one concrete example. Save it to /Users/uriel.blanco/work/to-app/team-demo-snapshots/prompt-summary.md
4. TaskUpdate({taskId: "1", status: "completed"})
5. SendMessage to "team-lead" saying you finished.

Keep it tight — under 200 words of work.

members.name: context-researcher
members.prompt:
You are a teammate on team "layers-demo". Your name is "context-researcher".

Your assignment: claim and complete task #2 ("Investigate context engineering layer").

Steps:
1. TaskGet({taskId: "2"})
2. TaskUpdate({taskId: "2", status: "in_progress", owner: "context-researcher"})
3. Write a one-paragraph (3-4 sentences) summary of context engineering with Karpathy's June 2025 definition. Save it to /Users/uriel.blanco/work/to-app/team-demo-snapshots/context-summary.md
4. TaskUpdate({taskId: "2", status: "completed"})
5. SendMessage to "team-lead" saying you finished.

Keep it tight — under 200 words of work.
